Explore chevron_right Galaxy Buds2 Pro
Galaxy Buds2 Pro with intelligent Active Noise Cancellation delivers crystal-clear 24-bit Hi-Fi sound. 360 Audio adapts to your environment in real time, while the ergonomic 3-point design ensures a secure, all-day comfortable fit. IPX7 water resistance protects against sweat and splashes.
Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.3
SKU: SM-R510NZWAXAR
Battery: Up to 5h (29h with case)
Driver: 10mm woofer + 6.3mm tweeter
ANC: Intelligent 3-mic system, 98% noise reduction
Ref: SM-R510
